revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:天佐自能和氣神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Amasashinowake Shrine | native_name = 天佐自能和氣神社 | image = Amasashinowake Shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Amasashinowake Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.096412|134.523677}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Amasashinowake Shrine'''|天佐自能和氣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 28 ** P155: {{ill|Q11435424|ltq=Q11435424|qid=Q11435424|1=Omiwa Shrine (Tokushima)}} ** P156: {{ill|Mimatsuhiko Shrine|lt=Mimatsuhiko Shrine|ja|御間都比古神社|qid=Q48759389|1=Mimatsuhiko Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Nakata district|lt=Nakata district|ja|名方郡|zh|名方郡|qid=Q3205778|1=Nakata district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.096412|134.523677}} == image (P18) == * Amasashinowake Shrine.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183202 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あまさしのわけじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4480005000019 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県徳島市不動東町四丁目569番地1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:天佐自能和氣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11442221}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed| date = October 2024}} {{Shrine |Name = Amasashinowake Shrine |Image = [[File:Amasashinowake Shrine.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima City|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} 569-1 Fudōhigashimachi 4-chōme |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates 2-stage degrees minutes seconds|34|05|58.5|N|134|31|02.9|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi no Mikoto|1=Kamimusubi}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi no Mikoto|1=Takamimusubi}}
Hikosashikatawake no Mikoto
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ofuyamato Kuniare-hime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Shikinai-shōsha|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = |Alternate names = |Pilgrimage designation = |Annual festival = October 17 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Amasashi-no
Wake Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Amasashinowake Shrine''' (あまさしのわけじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Fudōhigashimachi 4-chōme, {{ill|lt=Tokushima City|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === The date of its founding is unknown. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=shikinai shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} listed in the *{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}*. Originally, it enshrined Hikosashikatawake no Mikoto, a son of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōrei|Q313041|qid=Q313041|1=Emperor Kōrei}}. Later, his mother, Ofuyamato Kuniare-hime no Mikoto, was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=enshrined by invitation|1=UNKNOWN}}, and it is said that Kamimusubi no Mikoto and Takamimusubi no Mikoto were subsequently enshrined together. It was formerly a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=village shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi no Mikoto|1=Kamimusubi}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi no Mikoto|1=Takamimusubi}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hikosashikatawake no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ofuyamato Kuniare-hime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === * Sixteen-petal chrysanthemum === Subsidiary shrines === * There are about ten subsidiary shrines, including Wakamiya Shrine, Kotohira Shrine, and Yasaka Shrine. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto sidebar}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Amasashinowake Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Amasashinowake Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Amasashinowake Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]]
